crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority leasing or renewals task.

crons.name: applicant-screening-digest
crons.prompt: Run the applicant-screening skill in digest mode: score new applications against the written rubric and draft scorecards with recommendations. Never auto-decline and never send an applicant a decision.

crons.name: renewal-window-am
crons.prompt: Run renewals-coordinator in morning mode: detect leases entering the renewal window, score risk off payment history, and prep offer-packet drafts. Propose only; no resident or owner sends.

crons.name: renewal-window-pm
crons.prompt: Run renewals-coordinator in evening mode: surface changed renewal flags and deadline pressure only. Propose only; no resident or owner sends.

crons.name: lease-abstraction-intake
crons.prompt: Run lease-abstraction on any newly received leases: extract terms into structured data and flag missing, ambiguous, or contradictory clauses. Extract only; do not interpret legal meaning.

crons.name: fair-housing-presend-sweep
crons.prompt: Run fair-housing-guard over any pending applicant- or resident-facing drafts and screening criteria. Flag risks and propose compliant rewrites. Advisory only; surface, do not send.
